risk_title: School Crime and Violence Prevention Training Dependency
risk_summary: The project includes training on prevention measures for school crime and violence as part of the teacher diploma program, indicating that school crime and violence is a recognized concern affecting the project's target areas. This suggests existing or emerging violence dynamics in preschool settings that the project must address.
evidence_quote: The Diploma includes content on prevention measures for school crime and violence.

risk_title: Implementation Delays and Governance Capacity Constraints
risk_summary: Multiple performance-based conditions remain only partially achieved or off-track, including teacher certification (off-track with zero certified teachers as of May 2025) and human resource capacity strengthening (only 17.6% of reorganization activities completed). This reflects governance fragility and institutional capacity constraints affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: Completed five of six activities for the reorganization of the functions of the Preschool Sub directorate (17,6% of the DLR achieved)

risk_title: Institutional Capacity and Governance Fragility in Ministry of Education
risk_summary: The project required restructuring to adjust implementation strategy and component activities in alignment with revised government proposals, indicating governance instability and shifting institutional priorities that affect project execution.
evidence_quote: adjustment of activities in alignment with the revised implementation strategy proposed by the Government
